result.reason: Duplicating an SSH connection using Jump Mode causes the jump host resolution to fail, preventing connection establishment.
result.approach: Investigate ConnectionInfo.CopyFrom and ConnectionInitiator.getSSHConnectionInfoByName to ensure that the SSHTunnelConnectionName property is correctly preserved and resolved for duplicated SSH connections, especially when dealing with jump hosts and potential name collisions.
